message:
fix(i18n): bypass middleware for root path to debug 404 issue

Temporarily added a check to skip i18n middleware for root path requests.
This is a debugging measure to isolate whether the 404 issue is caused
by the internationalization redirect logic.

The root path now returns NextResponse.next() directly instead of
going through intlMiddleware, which should help identify if the
locale detection/routing is causing the problem.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
